title: 82 Year Old Witness of the 1952 DC UFO Flyover Incident
summary: An 82-year-old groundskeeper named Maurice Hill recounts his firsthand witness account of the famous 1952 Washington DC UFO flyover incident. He describes seeing a jellyfish-like object with a volcanic, bubbling appearance on its underside while standing on a street in Northeast DC.

events.description: Washington DC UFO flyover incident witnessed by Maurice Hill

key_claims.claim: Maurice Hill witnessed a jellyfish-like UFO ascending into the air during the 1952 DC flyover incident
The underside of the UFO appeared like looking into a volcano with reddish and black bubbling similar to lava
Maurice Hill is one of the last living witnesses of the 1952 DC flyover incident
